eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kerr, TX; at 6:05 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 8:05 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Flash Flood Emergency. Extremely dangerous. Do not attempt to travel unless you are fleeing an area subject to flooding. Dial 911 in the event of an emergency.
